title: Through My Window: Across the Sea
posterAlt: Through My Window: Across the Sea (2023) movie poster
tmdbOverview: After a year of long-distance, Raquel and Ares reunite on a steamy beach trip. Faced with fresh flirtations and insecurities, will their love prevail?
synopsis: Through My Window: Across the Sea is a 2023 romance, drama and comedy film from Spain. It has a 5.2 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
